title: Lattice Form Frame
description: A slicer — carves a box into Cells. The root Frame carves the whole slide; a sovereign Frame docked in the stage claims the canvas and suppresses chrome Cells (design/forms.md §5, §8, §9). One folder per Frame: lib/forms/frame/<id>/<id>.manifest.json. Adding a sovereign Frame folder (exemptFromChrome:true) auto-extends the engine's FORM_TOGGLE_SKIP set — see lib/integrations/markdown-it/plugins.js.

id.description: Frame identifier, kebab-case. For a sovereign Frame this is the `_class` value the toggle skips.

form.description: The Form value this Frame realizes (one of the twelve Frame types, design/design-system.md §4 / design/forms.md §8).

kind.description: root carves the slide keeping the chrome; sovereign claims the whole canvas and suppresses chrome Cells (design/forms.md §5). (A 'framed' kind — a Frame nested inside a content Cell — was considered and rejected: engineering/decisions/2026-06-18-frame-recursion-cells.md.)

exemptFromChrome.description: True for sovereign / chrome-skipped Frames. The set of Frames with exemptFromChrome:true IS the engine's FORM_TOGGLE_SKIP set (derived in lib/integrations/markdown-it/plugins.js).

cells.description: The Cell ids this Frame produces. Each MUST resolve to a real Cell definition (lib/forms/cell/).

suppresses.description: Chrome Cell ids a sovereign Frame hides. Each MUST resolve to a real Cell definition.

slicing.description: Per-family cell-PLACEMENT — how this Frame re-slices the box for each aspect family (lib/adaptive/families.js). An absent family = the default ('wide'/authored) slicing, so a runtime-less render is byte-unchanged. The runtime stamps data-family; same-band entries (tokens) generate [data-family]-keyed CSS, cross-band entries (a region differing from the Cell's default) generate the relocation table the runtime applies. See engineering/decisions/2026-06-21-reflow-as-form-capability.md §7.

^(square|tall|strip)$.description: Cell id → its placement at this aspect family. Cells not listed keep their default placement.

^[a-z][a-z0-9-]*$.description: A Cell's placement override at this family. Bounded by the kind-contract (forms.md §7): a relocation target region must accept the Cell's Tile kind.

region.description: The band this Cell occupies at this family. Differs from the Cell's default region → a CROSS-BAND relocation, applied by the runtime (content moves, never vanishes). null = drop — reserved for genuinely redundant content, NOT the default (dropping authored content silently is the fade decision forms.md §6 rejects).

tokens.description: Per-family CSS token overrides (same-band). The build GENERATES the [data-family] rule that sets these; each token NAME must be referenced via var() in the Cell's co-located CSS (gated). WARNING: if the Cell's grid places children on NAMED lines (e.g. masthead-lede/-bay), an override of the track template MUST re-declare those names on its track, or the children orphan into implicit tracks — so the single-column masthead value is { "--masthead-cols": "[masthead-lede masthead-bay] 1fr" }, NOT a bare "1fr".
